transactions.desc: The Nationals optioned Cornelio to Triple-A Rochester on Friday.
The Cubs optioned Ferguson to Triple-A Iowa on Friday.
The Cubs reinstated Thornton from the paternity list Friday.
The Brewers recalled Yoho from Triple-A Nashville on Friday.
Wilson cleared waivers Friday and elected to enter free agency in lieu of an outright assignment to Triple-A Norfolk, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
The Rockies optioned Peralta to Triple-A Albuquerque on Friday.
The Rockies selected Sullivan's contract from Triple-A Albuquerque ahead of his start Friday against the Athletics.
The Royals recalled Morgan from Triple-A Omaha on Friday.
The Orioles released Pham on Friday, Rich Dubroff of BaltimoreBaseball.com reports.
The Nationals claimed Lara off waivers and optioned him to Double-A Harrisburg Friday.
Atlanta released Handley on Friday.
The Tigers designated Short for assignment Friday.
The Tigers optioned Hanifee to Triple-A Toledo on Friday.
The Tigers optioned Brieske to Triple-A Toledo following Thursday's game against the Twins.
The Tigers selected Waguespack's contract from Triple-A Toledo on Friday.
The Diamondbacks designated Garcia for assignment Friday.
The Tigers reinstated Jansen (pelvis) from the 15-day injured list Friday.
The Cardinals recalled Roycroft from Triple-A Memphis on Friday, Derrick Goold of the St. Louis Post-Dispatch reports.
The Cardinals optioned Dobbins to Triple-A Memphis on Friday, Derrick Goold of the St. Louis Post-Dispatch reports.
The Cardinals optioned Gorman to Triple-A Memphis on Friday, Derrick Goold of the St. Louis Post-Dispatch reports.
Atlanta activated Waldrep (elbow) from the 60-day injured list Friday and subsequently optioned him to Triple-A Gwinnett.
The Cardinals selected Jordan's contract from Triple-A Memphis on Friday, Derrick Goold of the St. Louis Post-Dispatch reports.
The Astros selected Delgado's contract from Triple-A Sugar Land on Friday.
The Diamondbacks reinstated Lawlar (wrist) from the 60-day injured list, and he is starting in center field and batting seventh Friday against the Reds.
The Phillies recalled Rincones from Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Friday, Todd Zolecki of MLB.com reports.
The Blue Jays designated Heineman for assignment Friday.
The Blue Jays activated Kirk (thumb) from the 60-day injured list Friday.
The Guardians recalled Espino from Triple-A Columbus on Friday, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.
The Padres reinstated Bogaerts (personal) from the paternity list Friday.
The Padres designated Johnson for assignment Friday.
